.file-embed.background: rgba(62, 75, 80, 0.7) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.background: rgba(62, 75, 80, 0.7) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.is-loaded.background: rgba(62, 75, 80, 0.7) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.markdown-embed.background: rgba(62, 75, 80, 0.7) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(51, 60, 67) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(51, 60, 67) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgba(62, 75, 80, 0.7) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(51, 60, 67) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(51, 60, 67) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.callout-content.background: rgba(41, 49, 54, 0.3) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.callout-title.background: rgba(2, 122, 255, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(51, 60, 67) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(51, 60, 67) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(51, 60, 67) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(139, 108, 239, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(51, 60, 67) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(51, 60, 67) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(41, 49, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(85, 84, 74) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(41, 49, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre::after.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #363636 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#363636, color-mix(in srgb, #363636 65%, transparent))
pre::after.--file-header-font: '??', '??', '??', ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
pre::after.--font-default: ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
pre::after.--font-interface: '??', '??', '??', ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
pre::after.--font-mermaid: '??', '??', ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
pre::after.--font-monospace: '??', '??', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, "Consolas", "Source Code Pro", monospace
pre::after.--font-monospace-default: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, "Consolas", "Source Code Pro", monospace
pre::after.--font-text: '??', '??', ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
pre::after.--metadata-input-font: '??', '??', '??', ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
pre::after.--metadata-label-font: '??', '??', '??', ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
pre::after.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #363636 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#363636, color-mix(in srgb, #363636 65%, transparent))
pre::after.--raised-mask: linear-gradient(white, white) padding-box, linear-gradient(white, white) border-box
pre::after.--xfa-unfocused-field-background: url("data:image/svg+xmlcharset=UTF-8,<svg width='1px' height='1px' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='100%' height='100%' style='fill:rgba(0, 54, 255, 0.13)'/></svg>")
pre::after.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(41, 49, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: rgb(67, 79, 85) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(odd).background: rgb(58, 70, 76) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgb(72, 88, 78) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
